flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hellenic College-Holy Cross Greek Orthodox School of Theology fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (58.1% → 44.4%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Hellenic College-Holy Cross Greek Orthodox School of Theology rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($18.9k → $21.5k).
